title: AI Trade Falters; Chinese Investors Banned from SpaceX IPO; Jobs Report | Bloomberg Brief 6/5/2026
title_cn: 人工智能贸易步履蹒跚；中国投资者被禁止参与 SpaceX IPO；工作报告|彭博简报 2026 年 6 月 5 日
summary: US stocks head for its first weekly drop since March as the AI-fueled rally loses steam ahead of the May Jobs Report. Jensen Huang confirms that Nvidia has certified Samsung, SK Hynix, and Micron to supply the most advanced high-bandwidth products for its AI accelerators. Underwriters on SpaceX's IPO have been told not to accept orders from investors in Hong Kong and China, citing US restrictions around the export of critical technology. Veronica Clark of Citi looks ahead to the May Payrolls Report. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Airbus Delays XLR Deliveries to IndiGo as War Hits Supply Chain
title_cn: 由于战争影响供应链，空客推迟向 IndiGo 交付 XLR
summary: Airbus SE is falling behind on deliveries of the A321XLR, a longer-range version of its most popular jet, with Indian customer IndiGo unlikely to receive the full batch of nine units this year, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: India Growth Beats Estimates on Strong Domestic Demand
title_cn: 强劲的内需推动印度经济增长超出预期
summary: India’s economy grew faster than expected in the three months through March, on sustained private and government spending before higher energy costs began weighing on outlook.

title_cn: 伯恩斯坦因通胀、GLP-1 攻击而对包装食品库存感到不满
summary: A spate of upcoming headwinds ranging from rising oil prices to GLP-1s prompted one Bernstein analyst to throw in the towel on a handful of America’s largest packaged food companies.

title: Philippine Inflation Slows as Transport Cost Pressures Ease
title_cn: 随着运输成本压力缓解，菲律宾通胀放缓
summary: Philippine inflation unexpectedly decelerated last month as transport costs eased with the central bank saying it will take necessary actions to ensure inflation returns to its target.

summary: Manchester United is looking at tapping the private placement market to refinance $425 million of debt due next year, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

summary: India’s central bank and government unveiled a “bazooka” package to support the rupee after it plunged to a record low, dusting off a 2013 taper tantrum-era playbook to spur foreign inflows.

title_cn: 市场解读普拉博沃，印尼面临信心危机

summary: The euro-zone economy shrank at the start of the year after an unprecedented contraction in Ireland forced a revision to data that originally showed feeble growth.

summary: India is considering selling as much as a 2% stake in Hindustan Zinc Ltd. in a transaction that could raise up to 50 billion rupees ($525 million), according to people familiar with the matter.

summary: Algeria said it started building a pipeline to stretch across the Sahara, a project first proposed decades ago to supply gas from Nigeria and the region to customers in Europe.

title_cn: 预期美联储加息的债券交易员展望就业数据风险
summary: Treasury bond traders, having bought into the prediction that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates during the next 12 months, stand to pay a heavy price if US employment data for May are weak.

summary: Lisa Shalett, CIO at Morgan Stanley Wealth Management, sees investors mistaking pricing power in semiconductors as productivity and says she views Broadcom as “a warning flag” for markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Anthropic PBC called for the creation of a system in which governments and artificial intelligence developers collectively decide when to slow work on the technology to stave off the risks it may pose.

summary: Telenor ASA is considering selling its controlling stake in its digital bank in Pakistan, people familiar with the matter said, a move that would mark its full exit from the South Asian nation.

title_cn: 标准普尔拒绝 SpaceX 首次公开募股进入快速通道
summary: S&P Dow Jones Indices will not shorten its existing eligibility requirements for benchmarks including the S&P 500, closing the door to fast entry for big tech IPOs like SpaceX. Mandeep Singh of Bloomberg Intelligence has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 财富管理机构正面临聊天机器人的清算
summary: Old-school wealth managers look more vulnerable to AI disruption than perhaps any other professionals in financial services. Bloomberg's Isabelle Lee explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korean Stocks Drop as AI Mania Fades | The Opening Trade 6/5/2026
title_cn: 随着人工智能狂热消退，韩国股市下跌开盘交易 6/5/2026
summary:
US equity-index futures declined along with Asian stocks as enthusiasm for the artificial-intelligence trade cooled after driving markets to record highs this year.

Futures contracts for the Nasdaq 100 Index dropped 1%, indicating a third day of losses for the gauge as investors rotated out of tech stocks. MSCI’s Asian equities gauge fell 1.6%. South Korea’s Kospi — the world’s best-performing gauge this year and a bellwether for AI investments — slid 5.3%, with chipmaker SK Hynix Inc. tumbling 8.9%.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman’s Mueller-Glissman Sees Healthy Pullback in Tech Rally
title_cn: 高盛的穆勒-格利斯曼认为科技股的健康回调
summary: The recent selloff in technology stocks is a healthy sign after an increase in speculative positioning in the sector, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.’s head of asset allocation research.

title: Nvidia Clears ‘Big Three’ for Vera Rubin HBM4 Supply
title_cn: Nvidia 清除了 Vera Rubin HBM4 供应的“三巨头”
summary: Nvidia Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang confirmed that the company has certified the three biggest memory chipmakers to supply their most advanced high-bandwidth products for the US company’s AI accelerators. Matthew Bloxham of Bloomberg Intelligence has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OPEC+ Meets After UAE Exit
title_cn: 阿联酋退出后OPEC+召开会议
summary: OPEC+ ministers gather on June 7 for their first bi-annual policy meeting since the United Arab Emirates left the alliance last month, against a backdrop of extraordinary disruption. While the group is expected to maintain current output plans, investors are paying attention to the UAE's bet for more independence in global oil markets. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX, Other Mega IPOs Denied Fast Index Entry by S&P
title_cn: 标准普尔拒绝将 SpaceX 和其他大型 IPO 快速纳入指数
summary: S&P Dow Jones Indices will keep its existing eligibility requirements for benchmarks including the S&P 500, closing the door to fast entry for big tech IPOs like SpaceX and delaying billions of dollars in flows from passive funds.

title: Market Consolidation 'Healthy,' Goldman Says
title_cn: 高盛表示市场整合“健康”
summary: Christian Mueller-Glissmann, Head of Asset Allocation Research at Goldman Sachs, discusses market sentiment as enthusiasm for the artificial intelligence trade cools. "It's probably not a bad idea to see a bit of a consolidation," he tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What to Expect From Apple’s AI, Siri and iOS 27 Launch at WWDC
title_cn: Apple 在 WWDC 上发布的 AI、Siri 和 iOS 27 值得期待
summary: The iPhone maker will attempt its artificial intelligence turnaround on Monday.

title: Blackstone’s AirTrunk to Spend $30 Billion on India Data Centers
title_cn: Blackstone 的 AirTrunk 将斥资 300 亿美元建设印度数据中心
summary: AirTrunk, a data center operator backed by Blackstone Inc., plans to invest about $30 billion in India over the next few years to tap the country’s rapidly expanding AI and cloud markets.

title: Apex Space Doubles Valuation to $2.3 Billion in Funding Round
title_cn: Apex Space 在本轮融资中估值翻倍至 23 亿美元
summary: Startup Apex Space announced that it had raised more than $200 million as it works to increase production of satellite platforms for commercial firms and government work, including the development of President Donald Trump’s Golden Dome missile defense shield.

title: LS Power Said to Near Deal for EDF’s American Renewables Arm
title_cn: LS Power 据称即将收购 EDF 的美国可再生能源部门
summary: LS Power LLC is in advanced talks to buy Electricite de France SA’s North American renewable power business amid rising energy demand to supply data centers, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Schroders' Olu-Pitan and Shonfeld's Lancaster on Finding Value in an AI World
title_cn: 施罗德的奥卢-皮坦和肖菲尔德的兰开斯特谈在人工智能世界中寻找价值
summary: Remi Olu-Pitan of Schroders and Colin Lancaster of Schonfeld join 'The Opening Trade' to discuss the outlook for markets amid massive AI investment and disruption. The two join the show on the back of their appearance at the MLIV Money & Macro event in London. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Inside Hudson River Trading's Blistering Token Burn | Odd Lots
title_cn: 哈德逊河交易 (Hudson River Trading) 的代币燃烧热潮背后零股
summary: Today's episode, which was recorded at our recent live show at New York's City Winery, follows up on a conversation we had with Iain Dunning, head of AI at Hudson River Trading, last year, in which we talked about how his firm uses AI. Now, some seven months later, we follow up on how one of the biggest market makers around is deploying this technology. We talk about the price of memory, bottlenecks in compute, how much HRT employees are actually spending on tokens, why the firm might develop its own chips, as well as AI-induced delirium. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hon Hai Sales Growth Accelerates Beyond Estimates in May
title_cn: 鸿海五月销售增速超预期
summary: Hon Hai Precision Industry Co.’s revenue rose 34% in the April to May period, underscoring demand for the Nvidia Corp. servers essential to AI infrastructure.

title: US Firm to Build $6.2 Billion Lesotho Hydro Project, Data Center
title_cn: 美国公司将建设价值 62 亿美元的莱索托水电项目和数据中心
summary: Convalt Energy, a US-based company, agreed to spend $6.2 billion to build a 1,200-megawatt hydro-power project and an artificial intelligence data center in Lesotho.

title: Korean Police Launch Gambling Probe Targeting Polymarket Users
title_cn: 韩国警方针对综合市场用户展开赌博调查
summary: South Korean police have launched an investigation into local users of Polymarket over alleged illegal gambling, as the prediction-market platform faces mounting regulatory scrutiny while expanding its presence in Asia.

title: Nvidia Clears Memory’s Big Three for Vera Rubin HBM4 Supply
title_cn: Nvidia 清除内存三巨头，为 Vera Rubin HBM4 供应
summary: Nvidia Corp. has certified the three biggest memory chipmakers to supply their most advanced high-bandwidth products for the US company’s AI accelerators, Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang confirmed for the first time.

title: Senate Passes Immigration Bill After Feud Over $1.8 Billion Fund
title_cn: 参议院在 18 亿美元资金纠纷后通过移民法案
summary: President Donald Trump’s long-delayed immigration enforcement funding bill passed the US Senate early Friday, overcoming pushback from Republican dissidents concerned the administration would resurrect a controversial fund to pay political allies who claim to have been unfairly targeted by the federal government.

title: Nestle CEO Joins Warnings Against Swiss Population Cap Idea
title_cn: 雀巢首席执行官加入对瑞士人口上限想法的警告
summary: Nestle SA Chief Executive Officer Philipp Navratil warned Swiss citizens not to take its business-friendly environment for granted ahead of a national vote on a proposal to cap the population at 10 million.

title: South Africa President to Address Nation on Migration Action Plan
title_cn: 南非总统将就移民行动计划向全国发表讲话
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa will address the nation on the country’s approach to managing migration, according to Minister in the Presidency Khumbudzo Ntshavheni.

title: Why the Redistricting Spiral Will Keep Going
title_cn: 为什么重新划分选区的螺旋会继续下去
summary: Even as the dust settles for 2026, both parties are gearing up to do it again in 2028

title: UK Sees Risk of $100 Oil Until 2028 in Worsening Iran Outlook
title_cn: 英国认为伊朗前景恶化导致 2028 年油价将面临 100 美元的风险
summary: The UK government has revised its internal oil price forecasts upwards, assessing that crude could stay around $100 a barrel until 2028 even with a US-Iran peace deal because energy flows from the Gulf are now expected to take longer to recover.

title: Azerbaijan Says Drone Strikes Kill Five Nationals in Sea of Azov
title_cn: 阿塞拜疆称无人机袭击导致亚速海五名国民死亡
summary: Drone strikes killed five Azerbaijani citizens and injured three after hitting two foreign cargo vessels in the Sea of Azov overnight, the Foreign Ministry in Baku said.

title: Political Chaos at Home Adds to Marcos’s China Woes
title_cn: 国内政治混乱加剧了马科斯的中国困境
summary: Beleaguered at home, the Philippine president is navigating an increasingly fraught security environment.

title: Some in Putin’s Elite Signal Unease on Russia’s Future at Forum
title_cn: 普京的一些精英在论坛上表达了对俄罗斯未来的不安
summary: Amid all the relentlessly positive spin over Russia’s future direction at President Vladimir Putin’s flagship economic forum this week, some in the country’s political and business elite showed rare public signs of unease.

title: UK, France and Germany to Meet Zelenskyy on Peace Talks
title_cn: 英国、法国和德国将就和平谈判与泽连斯基会面
summary: The leaders of the UK, France and Germany are planning to gather over the weekend with Ukraine President Volodymyr Zelenskyy to discuss a path to engage Russia in negotiations to end the war.

title: Senate Passes Immigration Bill, Avoids Axing Weaponization Fund
title_cn: 参议院通过移民法案，避免削减武器化基金
summary: The Senate passed a $69.5 billion bill giving over three years of funding to two immigration enforcement agencies, taking a final step toward resolving a months-long dispute.

title: Slovene PM Takes Down Palestinian Flag in Pivot Back to Israel
title_cn: 斯洛文尼亚总理为重返以色列而摘下巴勒斯坦国旗
summary: Less than an hour after Janez Jansa was sworn in as Slovenia’s prime minister for the fourth time, he had the Palestinian flag lowered from the main government building in Ljubljana where it flew for two years.

title: The Key Sticking Points for a US-Iran Peace Deal
title_cn: 美伊和平协议的关键症结
summary: The US and Iran have been locked in a stalemate since agreeing to a ceasefire in April. They’ve been unable to reach a deal to end a monthslong war that has killed thousands of people and sparked a global energy crunch.

title: Jailed Leader’s Protege Attempts Left-Wing Comeback in Peru
title_cn: 被监禁领导人的门生试图左翼在秘鲁东山再起
summary: Roberto Sánchez campaigns wearing a traditional farmer’s hat from one of Peru’s poorest provinces, promising to slash the entrenched inequities in the copper-rich nation.

title: Xi to Visit North Korea Next Week for First Time Since 2019
title_cn: 习近平将于下周访问朝鲜，这是 2019 年以来首次
summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping will travel to North Korea next week, marking his inaugural overseas trip of the year after recently hosting Donald Trump and Russia’s Vladimir Putin in Beijing.

title: Romania Evacuates Black Sea Port After Marine Drone Explosion
title_cn: 罗马尼亚在海上无人机爆炸后疏散黑海港口
summary: A marine drone used in the war in Ukraine exploded in the Romanian port of Constanta a week after another drone crashed into a building in another town in the NATO and EU member state.

title: Serbia's Vucic on China Relationship, EU Accession
title_cn: 塞尔维亚武契奇谈中国关系和入盟
summary: Serbian President Aleksandar Vucic discusses China relations and the Balkan nation's accession negotiations with the European Union. He speaks to Bloomberg's Oliver Crook on June 1. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Second Malaysian State Calls Elections, Testing Anwar’s Grip
title_cn: 马来西亚第二个州号召大选，考验安华的掌控力
summary: A second Malaysian state this week dissolved its assembly and called for fresh elections, setting up a key test for Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s governing coalition.

title: US Accuses UK of ‘Two-Tiered Policing,’ Underlining Widening Gap
title_cn: 美国指责英国“双层警务”，凸显差距扩大
summary: The US accused the UK of biased policing, endorsing a prominent hard right criticism of Britain’s law enforcement in an unusual intervention that underscores the growing rift between the two allies.

title: US and Iran Show Little Progress in Talks After Week of Clashes
title_cn: 经过一周的冲突，美国和伊朗的谈判几乎没有取得任何进展
summary: The US and Iran have made little progress in talks over an interim peace deal this week, with the sides seeing their worst clashes since an April ceasefire began and fighting continuing in Lebanon.

title: AI Stocks Fall as Tech Momentum Fades, US-Iran Talks Stall | Daybreak Europe 6/05/2026
title_cn: 随着科技势头减弱、美伊谈判陷入僵局，人工智能股票下跌欧洲黎明 6/05/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

US equity-index futures declined along with Asian stocks as enthusiasm for the artificial-intelligence trade cooled after driving markets to record highs this year.

There was no sign of progress in ceasefire talks between the US and Iran after the worst burst of violence in weeks and as the Tehran-backed Hezbollah militia on Thursday rejected a US-brokered truce in Lebanon.

And Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy proposed peace talks to Russian leader Vladimir Putin in a rare and combative open letter, as efforts to end more than four years of war gained momentum.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Xenophobia Resurgence in South Africa Sparks Violence Fears
title_cn: 南非仇外心理死灰复燃引发暴力恐惧
summary: On a thoroughfare that usually throbs with music, shouted bargains and the bustle of downtown Johannesburg, the metal shutters on the shops are closed.

title: Political Gridlock Saps Romania’s Fight Against Stagflation
title_cn: 政治僵局削弱了罗马尼亚抗击滞胀的能力
summary: When Mihai Bordeanu, the head of Renault’s Dacia car plant in Romania met with former prime minister Ilie Bolojan last month, he had bad news about the country’s flagship export: sales were dropping and the company needed to lay off workers.

title: Zelenskyy Proposes Peace Talks in Open Letter to Putin
title_cn: 泽伦斯基在给普京的公开信中提议进行和平谈判
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy proposed peace talks to Russian leader Vladimir Putin in an open letter on Thursday. The appeal came as officials from Germany, France and the UK have been discussing the possibility of holding talks involving Russia and Ukraine, according to people familiar with the matter. Bloomberg's Anthony Halpin reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US-Iran Talks at a Standstill as Hezbollah Rejects Truce
title_cn: 真主党拒绝停战，美伊谈判陷入停滞
summary: There was no sign of progress in ceasefire talks between the US and Iran after the worst burst of violence in weeks and Tehran-backed Hezbollah rejected a US-brokered truce in Lebanon. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar breaks down the situation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Trump-Led Upheaval Has Changed Jens Stoltenberg’s World View
title_cn: 特朗普领导的剧变如何改变延斯·斯托尔滕贝格的世界观
summary: When Jens Stoltenberg was awarded the Kissinger Prize at a gala dinner hosted by the American Academy in Berlin in 2023, the then-NATO chief used his speech to caution against taking the transatlantic alliance for granted.

title: Ebola Bundibugyo Strain Spreads Fast
title_cn: 埃博拉本迪布焦菌株传播迅速
summary: The Ebola Bundibugyo strain is spreading fast with no known treatment or vaccine, and the international system built to contain outbreaks is in crisis. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU Trade Envoy Urges China to Fix Trade Gap at Paris Meeting
title_cn: 欧盟贸易特使在巴黎会议上敦促中国解决贸易逆差
summary: European Union’s trade envoy told his Chinese counterpart to address the “unsustainable” trade imbalance between the two economies, as the bloc weighs new restrictive measures against Beijing.

title: Russia Turns to Familiar Playbook Ahead of Armenia’s Election
title_cn: 俄罗斯在亚美尼亚大选前采取熟悉的策略
summary: The South Caucasus nation is the target of pro-Kremlin interference as it seeks deeper ties with Europe and the US.

title: Poland’s Antisemitic Firebrand Exposes Ugly Side of Economic Boom
title_cn: 波兰的反犹太主义煽动者暴露了经济繁荣的丑陋一面
summary: He sees Jews, Ukrainians and the EU as Poland’s enemies in a range of conspiracy theories. Yet Grzegorz Braun is emerging as a key political force.

title: US-Iran Talks Progress Stalls After Hezbollah Rejects Truce
title_cn: 真主党拒绝停战后，美伊谈判进展陷入停滞
summary: There was no sign of progress in ceasefire talks between the US and Iran after the worst burst of violence in weeks and as the Tehran-backed Hezbollah militia on Thursday rejected a US-brokered truce in Lebanon.
